title: Left Panel customization

posts.author: Trent (Trent Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I’d like to be able to stay in either Favorites or Workspaces. Right now I work exclusively out of my favorites and I’ve built folders to make it easy to find boards and manage workflows. After a recent update, when I open a board from my favorites it changes the view on the left panel to the workspace that it is housed under.

This makes me have to click on favorites and expand it then find the board I want to switch to.

Can we make it so if I open a board from my favorites my left panel view stays in favorites and if I open it from a workspace it stays in workspace view?

What are you trying to achieve

Reduce friction and make things more efficient (Like they used to be).
